name: Indian Passport
description: An official travel document issued by the Ministry of External Affairs, Government of India, to Indian citizens for international travel.
eligibility: Must be a citizen of India.
application_steps: Register on the Passport Seva Online Portal.
Login to the portal using the registered login Id.
Click 'Apply for Fresh Passport/Re-issue of Passport'.
Fill in the required details in the form and submit.
Click 'Pay and Schedule Appointment' to book an appointment.
Print the application receipt containing the Application Reference Number (ARN).
Visit the Passport Seva Kendra (PSK) with original documents on the scheduled date.

required_documents.name: Proof of Present Address
required_documents.purpose: To verify where the police verification should be conducted.
required_documents.where_to_get: Aadhaar, Electricity Bill, Rent Agreement, Telephone Bill

required_documents.name: Proof of Date of Birth
required_documents.where_to_get: Birth Certificate, Aadhaar, PAN Card, Transfer/School Leaving Certificate

common_mistakes: Current address mismatch with the address proof provided.
Failing to provide a continuous 1-year address history.
